title: ReCrafted Mobs x Fresh Animations
description: All the mobs of the Minecraft universe, now freshified!
body:
![spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

![Behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)
***
ReCrafted Mobs x Fresh Animation is the ultimate resource pack featuring many mobs from the Minecraft universe with fresh animations from the following games:

*   Minecraft Dungeons/Arcade
*   Minecraft Earth
*   Minecraft Legends (WIP)
*   Story Mode (NEW)
*   Bedrock/Education Edition
*   Mob/Biome Vote Mobs
*   Scrapped Mobs
*   April Fools Mobs

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/iKSeas2.png)

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)
***
This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)
***
These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skin and can spawn naturally.

![ReCrafted Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/VPkBSTL.png)

![Notes](https://i.imgur.com/36E9Ed4.png)
***
You must match the version of MC with a corresponding version of Fresh Animations!  
The packs MUST be formatted in the following way: ![pack_order](https://i.imgur.com/aGo098r.png)

This pack wouldn't be possible if it wasn't for:

*   Cave Fox
*   kekkman
*   Nayru/PinkuRinku
*   RavenVLemon
*   Ewanhowell5195
*   MickeyJoeAlpha

![License Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/kMMMcRh.png483284/1086427549204226138/License.png)
